summary: Show the next meeting in the Nucleus title with calendar detail on click.

introduced: Nucleus sidebar title shows the next meeting time, title, and calendar email; overlapping meetings at the same time rotate every 5 seconds
Clicking the next-meeting title opens Calendar, highlights the event, and shows full details in a side panel
changed: Calendar workspace uses a split layout with event list and detail panel (when, location, attendees, join link)
Toolbar status line includes next meeting time and email when mail is caught up
